properties.description: Detects when the Nessus daemon restarts unexpectedly. Frequent restarts may indicate instability, tampering, or a crash caused by resource exhaustion or attack.
properties.query:
NessusLogs
| where LogType == "ScanActivity" and EventStatus has "received signal"
| union (
    NessusLogs
    | where LogType == "BackendLog" and BackendMessage has_any ("started", "Starting") and BackendService == ""
)
| summarize RestartCount=count() by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where RestartCount >= 2
| extend HostCustomEntity = Computer
